description: Spread the joyful holiday spirit with this bright red free Christmas email template. The bold headline and CTA will immediately catch subscribers’ attention. Design this template with your product images, brand logo and limited time discounts that only subscribers have access to. This Christmas email template makes the online shopping experience more exciting with special product sneak peeks - start designing now!

designer.description: I’m an artisan user interface designer and front-end developer. I'm passionate about data visualization, user experience design and analytics interfaces. I enjoy solving complex problems that require a deep understanding of interface design, front-end development, and product management.
